payload.description: Tropical Storm Isaias inflicted delays from August third through the end of the month with train delays in excess of 365 late, canceled & terminated trains for MNR.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Performance was affected by Tropical Storm Isaias. The storm's effects inflicted delays from August third through the end of the month with train delays in excess of 365 LATE, CANCELED & TERMINATED trains.

tool_args.label: Corys, Inc. Train Simulator Systems - LIRR

payload.project_name: M7/M9, DM Locomotive, C3 Train Simulator Systems
payload.description: LIRR competitive procurement to award contract to Corys, Inc. to design, manufacture, test and deliver Train Simulator Systems for M-7/M-9, Dual Mode (DM) Locomotive and C-3 fleets.

evidence_refs.source_quote: LIRR requests MTA Board approval to award a competitively negotiated contract in the amount of $3,186,584 to Corys, Inc.

evidence_refs.source_quote: The LIRR ushered in the new year with the opening of the Moynihan Train Hall. This long-awaited project finally provides a world class transportation hub to our customers.

tool_args.label: March 2021 Timetable Change & Trackwork Programs - LIRR

payload.project_name: March Timetable Change & Trackwork Programs - Spring 2021
payload.description: LIRR schedule adjustment from March 8 through May 23, 2021 to support construction projects including Port Washington Branch Concrete Tie Installation, Main Line Expansion, Third Rail Maintenance, Massapequa Pocket Track Construction, Babylon Interlocking Construction, and Beaver Interlocking Construction.

evidence_refs.source_quote: This is to inform the Long Island Committee of the MTA Long Island Rail Road's plan to adjust schedules beginning March 8, 2021 through May 23, 2021.

payload.claim_text: Metro-North Railroad has implemented proactive safety initiatives since the beginning of the COVID-19 pandemic including social distancing promotion, face covering requirements, enhanced cleaning, employee temperature screening, COVID-19 antibody testing, personal protective equipment distribution, seasonal flu shots, free onsite PCR testing, face covering campaign, and offering COVID-19 vaccination to frontline employees under Phase 1b.
payload.subject: Metro-North Railroad

payload.claim_text: For the reporting period ending December 2020, the average Reportable Customer Injury Rate was 5.18 injuries per million customers. The actual number of customer injuries is down fifty-six percent from 2019 to 2020. Ridership however is also down by sixty-seven percent which impacts the rate. Slips, trips, and falls account for over ninety percent of the injuries reported. Penn Station is the location with the most customer injuries.
payload.subject: Long Island Rail Road

tool_args.label: LIRR 2020 OTP Increase from LIRR Forward

payload.claim_text: LIRR's On-Time Performance for 2020 was 95.9 percent, an increase of 3.5 percentage points from the previous year, and 1.9 percentage points above the goal of 94.0%. Performance improvements were seen among all categories of delay. This can be attributed to many of the initiatives identified under the LIRR Forward program.
payload.subject: Long Island Rail Road

payload.project_name: Station Improvement Initiatives at Harlem-125th Street, Riverdale, Crestwood, White Plains and Port Chester
payload.description: Develop and improve station aesthetics, introduce new technology, and develop sustainability initiatives. Key focus is White Plains Station, Metro-North's third busiest station.

tool_args.label: MNR Customer Service Initiative - Outlying Stations

payload.project_name: Customer Service Initiative (CSI) - Outlying Stations Public Announcement/Visual Information and Surveillance/Access Control Systems
payload.description: System-wide upgrade of public address, visual information and video surveillance/access control systems at 20 Metro-North stations and facilities throughout New York, plus elevator monitoring upgrades.

PTC implementation for Metro-North Railroad. 244.3 miles (100% East of Hudson) of track in full PTC protection as of December 2020. On-board, wayside, and communications installations completed. Commenced ERSD on Port Jervis Line in December 2020.

tool_args.label: MNR Power, C&S Infrastructure Restoration - Sandy

payload.description: Replace and restore to a state of good repair power and communication and signal (C&S) equipment and infrastructure destroyed/damaged by Superstorm Sandy on over 30 miles of railroad along the Hudson Line from CP 5 (Bronx) to CP 35 (Croton-Harmon).

tool_args.label: MNR Sandy C&S Restoration - Anticipated Completion Q3 2021

payload.description: Overall project substantial completion anticipated in Q3 2021 for MNR Power, C&S Infrastructure Restoration – Sandy

evidence_refs.source_quote: Overall project substantial completion is anticipated in the third quarter 2021.
